title: Tyz's Hammers
description:
Tyz's hammer is a mod which allows you to use differents hammers with differents abilities.
The mod adds new things to gameplay while preserving the vanilla aspect.
body:
![title](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/5b8b46_cf946c3d6bea4851b0b67275d5f7326a~mv2.png/v1/fill/w_1361,h_568,al_c,q_90,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Title5_1.png)


## **📖Overview**

Tyz's hammer is a mod which allows you to use differents hammers with differents abilities.You can mine a 3x3 or 5x5 area.You can auto smelt ores, break bedrock and many others possibilities.


## **✨Features**

- Hammers for all ressources (iron, copper, diamond...)

- Upgradable hammers (3x3 to 5x5 or durability)

- Magma hammer (auto smelt ores)

- Steel hammer (can break bedrock)

- Emerald hammer (can duplicate blocks)

- Amethyst hammer (haste)

- Obsidian hammer (durability)

- Special workbench

- Other items

## **📁Other**
This is the final version of this mod. We will add some updates with bugs fix and minor additions.
If you notice errors, please let us know by using discord (https://discord.com/invite/NxCBfqGZKx) or our website (https://tyzscoorp.wixsite.com/homepage).
